articles.headline: U.S. Department of Commerce approves broad rollout of OpenAI's GPT-5.6
articles.summary: The U.S. has approved a broad launch of OpenAI's advanced GPT-5.6 model, enabling enterprises to deploy the system for productivity and automation at scale. This regulatory clearance removes a major barrier for business adoption of next-gen AI, potentially impacting workforce planning and operational efficiency.

articles.headline: Amazon raises at least $25 billion in bond sale to fund massive AI investments
articles.summary: Amazon is raising $25 billion through a U.S. dollar bond sale to support its heavy AI infrastructure and cloud spending. This financing move reflects the escalating capital costs of AI deployment, impacting credit markets, supplier valuations, and long-term business planning for cloud competitors and AI service providers.

articles.headline: General Motors integrates 50 collaborative robots after laying off 1,000 workers
articles.summary: General Motors has deployed over 50 'cobots' at Factory Zero following the termination of more than 1,000 employees, signaling a major shift in automation-driven workforce restructuring. This case highlights the operational trade-offs between labor reduction and capital investment in robotics, with implications for SMEs evaluating similar automation strategies.
